notes: BattleResult now stores ObjectiveBattleOutcome with final victory/supply/visibility control, labels, events, resource deltas, theater pressure deltas, and visibility-derived intel shift.
applyBattleResult applies objective pressure deltas to the current sector/theater, adds objective resource deltas, and passes visibility intel shift into next-turn strategic intel preparation.

This QA covered the visible victory-point strategic pressure path. Supply-held resource gain and visibility-held intel shift are implemented from the same objectiveOutcome path but require a longer hold-state scenario for direct browser observation.
Mobile QA was intentionally skipped because mobile is outside the current target.
